zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre於1287年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布達皮時，她的父親Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II33歲，母親Isabeau de Brienne16歲。她於從1305年1月到1306年1月8日與Gaucher V de Châtillon結婚。她去世於1316年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o利享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre于1287年出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布達皮时，她的父亲Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II33岁，母亲Isabeau de Brienne16岁。她于从1305年1月到1306年1月8日与Gaucher V de Châtillon结婚。她去世于1316年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o利享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre was born in 1287, in Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, her father, Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II, was 33 and her mother, Isabeau de Brienne, was 16. She married Gaucher V de Châtillon from January 1305 to 8 January 1306. She died in 1316, in Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre est née en 1287, à Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Brienne, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Gaucher V de Châtillon du janvier 1305 au 8 janvier 1306. Elle est décédée en 1316, à Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre 1287 in Dampierre, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II 33 und ihre Mutter Isabeau de Brienne 16. Sie hat von Januar 1305 bis 8. Januar 1306 Gaucher V de Châtillon geheiratet. Sie starb 1316 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre è nata il nel 1287 nel Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Isabeau de Brienne, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Gaucher V de Châtillon da gennaio 1305 a 8 gennaio 1306. Morì nel 1316, nel Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandreが1287年にフランスグランド エストアウベダンパエアで生まれた時，父Jean de Dampierre-Flandre IIは33歳，母Isabeau de Brienneは16歳であった。から1305年1月まで1306年1月8日にGaucher V de Châtillonと結婚した。彼女は1316年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンスエウリーで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre(이)가 1287년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabeau de Brienne(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1305년 1월 부터 1306년 1월 8일까지 Gaucher V de Châtillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1316년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 테우리에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre nasceu em 1287, em Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau de Brienne, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Gaucher V de Châtillon de janeiro de 1305 a 8 de janeiro de 1306. Ela faleceu em 1316, em Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre родилась в 1287 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Brienne, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gaucher V de Châtillon с январь 1305 по 8 января 1306. Она умерла в 1316 г. в местности теули, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Dampierre-Flandre nació en 1287, en Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean de Dampierre-Flandre II, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Brienne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Gaucher V de Châtillon desde enero de 1305 hasta 8 de enero de 1306. Murió en 1316, en Theuley, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 29 años.
